name: Static Analysis Scan
description: Run static analysis rules against source files to detect security vulnerability patterns. Checks for injection flaws, auth issues, data exposure, and unsafe coding patterns.

parameters.name: paths
parameters.description: File paths or directories to scan

items.name: path
items.description: File path or glob pattern to scan

parameters.name: rules
parameters.description: Specific rule categories to enable. Omit for all rules.

items.name: rule
items.description: Rule category (injection, auth, crypto, data-exposure, xss, csrf, path-traversal)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Minimum severity threshold for reported findings

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: Paths or patterns to exclude from scanning

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Target language for language-specific rules. Auto-detected if omitted.

outputDescription: Array of findings: {ruleId, severity, message, file, line, column, snippet, category, cwe}. Empty array if no issues found.
author: openspace
